original_file: OpenRouter Security Alert: API Key Exposed
email_subject: OpenRouter Security Alert: API Key Exposed
email_body:
IMPORTANT: One of your OpenRouter API keys has been found exposed in a public repository.

The affected key ends in: ...a1c8



Location found: https://github.com/Muhammad-Ali-Asghar-Rizwan/Phase-II-TODO-Full-Stack-Web-Application_TO_Backend/blob/2eadd99d29965ac14e6ce84db92cdb352e907825/.env



We have disabled this API key and it can no longer be used.



NEXT STEPS:

1. Please create a new API key at: https://openrouter.ai/keys

2. Update any applications using this key



For security best practices, please ensure your API keys are never committed to public repositories.



If you need any assistance, please contact support@openrouter.ai
